articles.title: Nasdaq 100 Notches Best Day in Weeks as Chipmakers Rebound
articles.summary: The Nasdaq 100 Index posted its best day in three weeks on Tuesday as a rebound in chipmakers at the center of the artificial-intelligence trade overshadowed the re-escalation in the US-Iran war.

articles.title: Capital One Profit Beats Estimates as Loan-Loss Provisions Drop
articles.summary: Capital One Financial Corp., the biggest US credit-card lender, swung to a profit in the second quarter as it set aside less money to cover bad loans than Wall Street had anticipated.

articles.title: Canadian Stocks Climb as Gold Surge Offsets Trump Tariff Threat
articles.summary: Canadian stocks climbed Tuesday despite US President Donald Trump threatening 50% tariffs on the country’s exports, thanks to surging gold prices and a rally in tech hardware stocks.

articles.title: Stocks Climb as Rebound in Chipmakers Gathers Pace: Markets Wrap
articles.summary: Wall Street staged a comeback as dip buyers emerged, lifting stocks amid a rally in chipmakers on bets the artificial-intelligence trade that’s powered the bull market has more room to run.

articles.title: US Yields Hit Two-Month High as Oil Sparks Inflation Risk
articles.summary: US Treasuries fell, pushing 10- and 30-year yields to the highest in about two months, as a surge in oil prices stoked concern that inflationary pressures will prompt the Federal Reserve to raise inte

articles.title: Latest Oil Market News and Analysis for July 21
articles.summary: Brent oil advanced to the highest since early June as traders weighed threats to maritime traffic that span from the Strait of Hormuz and the Red Sea to a key Kazakh export terminal on Russia’s coast.

articles.title: Gold and Silver Rise on Dip-Buying as Traders Weigh Fed Strategy
articles.summary: Gold and silver advanced on dip-buying as traders monitored Middle East tensions for signs that higher energy costs could stoke inflation, putting pressure on the Federal Reserve to tighten policy.

articles.title: Treasury Flags Concern Over ‘Potentially Abusive’ Tax Trades
articles.summary: The US Treasury Department has expressed concern over a number of high-profile tax strategies touted by Wall Street that it says may be “too good to be true.”

articles.title: BlackRock vs BlackRock: Aston Martin Debt Revamp Risks In-House Clash
articles.summary: A potential debt revamp at Aston Martin Lagonda Global Holdings Plc is setting the stage for an unusual battle between different divisions of asset management giant BlackRock Inc.
